generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw this in the news - Portland had a civil defense drill last month, and half the city didn't even know it was happening. Our neighbors to the north are taking this seriously, but here? Crickets. We're sitting ducks if things go south. Time to demand our leaders actually prepare us instead of just talking about it. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
